plugin.name: Proteles_Demo
plugin.author: Proteles
plugin.purpose: Verifies Proteles plugin loading (aliases, triggers, GMCP, lifecycle)
plugin.description: A small plugin that proves Proteles can load and run MUSHclient/Aardwolf plugins. Type `pdemo` to read your live HP via GMCP, or `greet <name>`.

alias.name: pdemo
alias.send: local hp = gmcp("char.vitals.hp") local maxhp = gmcp("char.maxstats.maxhp") if hp then ColourNote("green", "", "[Proteles Demo] HP: " .. tostring(hp) .. "/" .. tostring(maxhp or "?")) else ColourNote("yellow", "", "[Proteles Demo] No GMCP vitals yet - connect to Aardwolf and try again.") end

muclient.script:
require "gmcphelper"
function OnPluginInstall() local installs = (tonumber(GetVariable("installs")) or 0) + 1 SetVariable("installs", tostring(installs)) ColourNote("white", "blue", "[Proteles Demo] Plugin loaded (run #" .. installs .. "). Try: pdemo | greet <name>") end
function OnPluginConnect() ColourNote("green", "", "[Proteles Demo] Connected" .. (IsConnected() and "." or "?")) end
